commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a structured `core/doctor/memory-search` doctor lint check by collecting existing memory-search doctor notes without running QMD binary probes in lint mode.

PR surface: Source +72, Tests +106. Total +178 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence executed reproduction in this review; source inspection shows current main lacks the structured check and the PR registers it in the doctor lint contribution path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Protected label, draft state, missing inspectable real behavior proof, and a maintainer-owned lint warning-surface decision make this a human review item rather than an automated repair candidate.

target.title: doctor: add memory search lint findings
target.body:
## Summary
- Adds `core/doctor/memory-search` as a structured Doctor lint finding source.
- Reuses the existing memory-search doctor note logic through an injected note sink so legacy `openclaw doctor` output stays unchanged.
- Keeps lint read-only/safe: skips informational disabled-memory notes, treats unprobed key-optional readiness as skipped, and suppresses configured QMD binary probing from lint detection.

## Contract / Safety
- No plugin SDK/public contract changes (`plugin-sdk-surface-report --check` clean).
- No repair behavior or data model change.
- `openclaw doctor --lint --only core/doctor/memory-search` reports config/auth findings only; it does not execute configured QMD commands.

## Proof
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/commands/doctor-memory-search.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts --reporter=verbose` (2 shards, 103 tests)
- `.\node_modules\.bin\oxfmt.CMD --check src/commands/doctor-memory-search.ts src/commands/doctor-memory-search.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `.\node_modules\.bin\oxlint.CMD src/commands/doctor-memory-search.ts src/commands/doctor-memory-search.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:core`
- `node scripts/plugin-sdk-surface-report.mjs --check`
- `git diff --check origin/main..HEAD`
- Source CLI proof with isolated config/state:
  - missing OpenAI key: `doctor --lint --json --only core/doctor/memory-search` exits 1 with `core/doctor/memory-search` warning at `agents.defaults.memorySearch.provider`
  - disabled memory search: exits 0 with no findings
  - local provider with no readiness probe: exits 0 with no findings
  - QMD backend with deliberately missing configured command: exits 0 with no findings, proving lint does not probe/spawn the configured QMD command
- `python .agents\skills\autoreview\scripts\autoreview --mode local --engine codex` clean after fixes
